meta.patient_context: Post-sleeve gastrectomy (June 24, 2026). Severe peanut + shellfish allergies. 5-phase bariatric diet.

phase_definitions.clear_liquids: Days 1-3: Only water, broth, sugar-free Jell-O, sugar-free clear protein drinks
phase_definitions.full_liquids: Days 4-14: Protein shakes, thinned yogurt, strained soups, sugar-free pudding
phase_definitions.pureed: Weeks 3-4: Blendable to applesauce consistency — eggs, cottage cheese, blended chicken, refried beans
phase_definitions.soft_solids: Weeks 5-6: Flaked fish, ground meat, soft-cooked veg, scrambled eggs, soft cheeses
phase_definitions.regular: Week 7+: Lean protein + non-starchy veg. AVOID: rice, bread, pasta, fried, sugar, carbonation

meta.allergen_disclaimer: All data sourced from official chain nutrition pages, allergen PDFs, and verified nutrition databases as of June 2026. Always confirm with the restaurant at time of ordering. Cross-contact cannot be fully guaranteed at any fast-food establishment. Consult your bariatric dietitian and allergist before introducing any new foods.

chains.name: Chick-fil-A
chains.general_notes: Uses 100% refined, bleached, deodorized peanut oil for all fried items. Per FDA, highly refined peanut oil is not classified as a major allergen (proteins removed in processing). However, for SEVERE peanut allergy: discuss with allergist before visiting. Cross-contact with wheat, egg, soy, dairy present in shared kitchen. No shellfish used. Grilled items are the safest choice.
chains.peanut_oil_warning: CRITICAL: Fried items (nuggets, tenders, sandwiches) cooked in refined peanut oil. Grilled items are NOT fried and do not contact this oil. Consult allergist — refined oil is generally considered safe but individual sensitivity varies. Waffle fries now cooked in canola oil.

items.name: Grilled Nuggets 8-ct
items.peanut_note: Grilled, not fried — no peanut oil contact
items.order_mods: Plain, no sauce. Cut or chew very thoroughly. Start with 2-3 pieces in early soft-solids phase.

items.name: Grilled Nuggets 12-ct
items.peanut_note: Grilled, not fried — no peanut oil contact
items.order_mods: Plain, no sauce. Excellent high-protein option for regular phase.

items.name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich (filet only)
items.peanut_note: Grilled filet not fried; bun contains gluten
items.order_mods: Order filet only, no bun. Remove lettuce and tomato initially. No sauce. Filet alone: ~150 cal, 28g protein.

items.name: Egg White Grill (sandwich)
items.order_mods: Remove English muffin. Eat egg white + grilled chicken only. ~150 cal, ~23g protein without bread.

items.name: Hash Brown Scramble Bowl
items.order_mods: Request no hash browns, extra egg/chicken. High fat — portion to 3-4 oz in early phases.

items.name: Chicken, Egg & Cheese Muffin (egg + chicken only)
items.order_mods: Remove English muffin entirely. Eat chicken + egg + cheese only. Much lower carbs and calories without bread.

items.name: Grilled Cool Wrap (filling only)
items.order_mods: Remove wrap entirely. Eat lettuce, grilled chicken, and cheese only. No dressing.

items.name: Side Salad (no dressing)
items.order_mods: No croutons, no dressing. Add grilled nuggets for protein.

items.name: Chicken Noodle Soup (cup)
items.order_mods: Strain out noodles for full-liquids phase. Blend for pureed phase. Excellent for early phases — chicken broth base with protein.

items.name: Greek Yogurt Parfait (yogurt only)
items.tree_nut_warning: Contains granola with tree nuts — remove granola
items.order_mods: REMOVE granola (tree nuts). Eat yogurt only. Good source of protein in early phases.

items.name: Waffle Potato Fries (small)
items.never_recommended_reason: High fat, high carb, fried food. Empty calories with minimal protein. Not bariatric appropriate.
items.order_mods: Avoid entirely post-sleeve.

chains.name: Starbucks
chains.general_notes: No shellfish used. CRITICAL: Eggs & Cheddar Protein Box contains PEANUT BUTTER — avoid entirely. Starbucks cannot guarantee allergen-free due to shared equipment. Egg bites are excellent high-protein options. Protein Cold Foam / Protein Latte line uses whey protein isolate (dairy). For clear/full liquid phases: unsweetened teas, sparkling water only. Avoid all sugary drinks post-sleeve (dumping syndrome risk).

items.name: Egg White & Roasted Red Pepper Sous Vide Egg Bites (2-ct)
items.order_mods: No modifications needed. Soft, moist texture ideal for pureed/soft phase. Start with 1 bite in pureed phase.

items.name: Bacon & Gruyere Sous Vide Egg Bites (2-ct)
items.order_mods: Eat slowly. High fat — portion to 1 bite in early soft-solids. Good protein density.

items.name: Kale & Mushroom Sous Vide Egg Bites (2-ct)
items.order_mods: Best bariatric egg bite — highest protein, lowest sodium. Start with 1 bite in pureed phase.

items.name: Ham, Cheddar & Peppers Sous Vide Egg Bites (2-ct)
items.order_mods: Good protein. Portion carefully — 1 bite initially.

items.name: Spinach, Feta & Egg White Wrap (filling only)
items.order_mods: Remove wrap tortilla. Eat egg white, spinach, feta filling only. ~150 cal, ~14g protein without wrap.

items.name: Turkey & Havarti Sandwich (protein only)
items.order_mods: Remove bread. Eat turkey + cheese only. No peanuts, no shellfish. ~120 cal, ~18g protein without bread.

items.name: Protein Cold Foam (vanilla)
items.order_mods: Add to cold brew (no sugar). Made with whey protein isolate. Excellent protein boost for all post-liquid phases.

items.name: Unsweetened Cold Brew (plain)
items.order_mods: No sweetener. Caffeine can reduce calcium absorption — limit in first 6 months. No carbonation, no straws.

items.name: Unsweetened Iced Green Tea
items.order_mods: No sweetener, no classic syrup. Good hydration option. Ask for no ice in early phases to sip slowly.

items.name: Cheese & Fruit Protein Box
items.order_mods: Eat cheese only. Remove crackers (carbs), skip fruit (sugar). Tree nuts present — verify severity of tree nut allergy.

items.name: Eggs & Cheddar Protein Box
items.peanut_note: CONTAINS PEANUT BUTTER — DO NOT ORDER
items.never_recommended_reason: Contains peanut butter spread. SEVERE peanut allergy — completely contraindicated.
items.order_mods: AVOID ENTIRELY.

items.name: Plain Siggi's Icelandic Yogurt (sold at some locations)
items.order_mods: Plain or low-sugar flavor. One of best portable protein sources at Starbucks. Availability varies by location.

chains.name: Jamba Juice
chains.general_notes: CRITICAL: Many smoothies contain peanut butter — PB + Banana, PB Chocolate Love, Peanut Butter Moo'd, all PB items are CONTRAINDICATED. No shellfish used at Jamba. Most smoothies are HIGH sugar — post-sleeve dumping syndrome risk. Stick to protein-boosted options with WHEY PROTEIN boost and limit to 8-12 oz. All smoothies are thin enough for full-liquids phase if made correctly. Key tip: request NO honey, NO extra sugar, and ask for SMALL size only.

items.name: Protein Berry Workout (Whey) — Small
items.order_mods: Order SMALL only (8-12 oz). No added honey. Sip slowly over 30+ min. High sugar — limit frequency. Best protein option at Jamba.

items.name: Protein Berry Workout (Soy) — Small
items.order_mods: Order SMALL. Dairy-free alternative. Still very high sugar — sip slowly.

items.name: Spinach, Feta and Tomato Egg White Soufflé
items.order_mods: One of the best bariatric-appropriate food items at Jamba. Soft egg texture. Eat slowly.

items.name: Spring Veggie Egg Bake
items.order_mods: Excellent 1g carb, high protein egg bake. Great for regular and soft-solids phases.

items.name: Ham, Egg and Swiss Breakfast Sandwich (filling only)
items.order_mods: Remove bread entirely. Eat ham, egg, and cheese filling only.

items.name: Oatmeal (plain, no toppings)
items.order_mods: No brown sugar, no honey, no fruit toppings. Thin with water for pureed phase. Add whey protein boost. Limit portion — high carb.

items.name: Non-fat Greek Yogurt Boost
items.order_mods: Add to any smoothie for extra protein. Only 40 cal, 7g protein.

items.name: Whey Protein Boost
items.order_mods: Add to any fruit smoothie to boost protein. Best protein boost per calorie at Jamba.

items.name: Cold Brew Over Ice (plain, small)
items.order_mods: No sweetener. Sip slowly. Limit caffeine in first 6 months post-op.

items.name: PB + Banana Protein Smoothie (any size)
items.peanut_note: CONTAINS PEANUT BUTTER — DO NOT ORDER
items.never_recommended_reason: Contains peanut butter. SEVERE peanut allergy — completely contraindicated.
items.order_mods: AVOID ENTIRELY.

items.name: Peanut Butter Moo'd Smoothie (any size)
items.never_recommended_reason: Contains peanut butter. SEVERE peanut allergy. Also extremely high sugar — post-sleeve dumping risk.
items.order_mods: AVOID ENTIRELY.

chains.name: McDonald's
chains.general_notes: No peanuts or peanut oil used in standard US menu items. No shellfish in standard US menu items. Fries, nuggets, and fish items are cooked in shared fryers with fish (Filet-O-Fish) — cross-contact risk for fish allergy. Shared kitchen environment means cross-contact cannot be guaranteed. Grilled chicken filet (Artisan) is the primary bariatric protein option.

items.name: Artisan Grilled Chicken Filet (no bun)
items.order_mods: Request filet only, no bun, no sauce. 28g protein, 130 cal — excellent bariatric choice. Ask for it plain.

items.name: Egg McMuffin (egg + Canadian bacon + cheese, no muffin)
items.order_mods: Remove English muffin. Eat egg + Canadian bacon + cheese only. ~160 cal, ~15g protein without muffin.

items.name: Sausage McMuffin with Egg (egg + sausage + cheese, no muffin)
items.order_mods: Remove English muffin. High fat from sausage — limit portion size. Better choice: substitute egg patty only.

items.name: Scrambled Eggs (2-ct)
items.order_mods: Order scrambled eggs only. No salt, no condiments. Excellent soft protein source.

items.name: Side Salad (no dressing, no croutons)
items.order_mods: No dressing, no croutons. Pair with grilled chicken filet. Low calorie, minimal nutrition on its own.

items.name: Artisan Grilled Chicken Sandwich (no bun)
items.order_mods: Remove bun entirely. Eat grilled chicken, lettuce, tomato only. No sauce. ~200 cal, ~33g protein without bun.

items.name: Apple Slices
items.order_mods: Post-regular phase only. Small amounts. High in natural sugar compared to bariatric needs — not primary food.

chains.name: Wendy's
chains.general_notes: No peanuts or tree nuts used in regular menu items (Apple Pecan Salad contains pecans — avoid). No shellfish used. Fish (Alaskan Pollock in Crispy Fish Sandwich) is present — fries and nuggets share fryer with fish. Grilled chicken is safest protein choice. Chili contains no top-9 allergens and is excellent for bariatric patients. Note: Wendy's announced fish allergen cross-contact in shared fryers (FoodAllergy.org advisory 2026).

items.name: Grilled Chicken Breast (patty only)
items.order_mods: Request grilled chicken patty only, no bun, no sauce. Top protein choice at Wendy's.

items.name: Grilled Chicken Sandwich (no bun)
items.order_mods: Remove bun. Eat chicken, lettuce, tomato only. No sauce/mayo.

items.name: Small Chili
items.allergen_note: Wendy's chili contains NO top-9 allergens per verified sources
items.order_mods: No cheese, no sour cream, no crackers. Blend or mash for pureed phase. One of the best fast-food bariatric options — no major allergens, good protein and fiber.

items.name: Large Chili
items.order_mods: No cheese, no sour cream, no crackers. High sodium — watch fluid intake.

items.name: Southwest Avocado Chicken Salad (no dressing, no tortilla strips)
items.order_mods: No dressing, no tortilla strips, no cheese. Grilled chicken + avocado + greens only. Excellent regular-phase meal.

items.name: Baked Potato (plain)
items.order_mods: Plain only — no butter, no sour cream. Very high carb — eat as side, small portion only. Better choice: pair with grilled chicken, eat chicken first.

items.name: Jr. Cheeseburger (patty + cheese only)
items.order_mods: Remove bun. Eat beef patty + cheese only. Ground beef is easier to chew. No ketchup, no sauce.

items.name: Dave's Single (patty only)
items.order_mods: Beef patty only, no bun, no condiments, no cheese. Fresh, never-frozen beef — no major allergens in patty alone.

chains.name: Taco Bell
chains.general_notes: GOOD NEWS: Taco Bell does NOT use peanuts, tree nuts, fish, or shellfish in ANY regular US menu items. Peanut and shellfish safe across the board for standard items. Main allergens present: milk, wheat, soy, egg (breakfast only). Corn taco shells are gluten-free. Power Menu Bowl (chicken) is the top bariatric choice. Rice and beans are carb-heavy — skip for regular bariatric phase, small amounts in pureed. Fresco Style removes cheese/sour cream to reduce dairy.

items.name: Grilled Chicken (protein only)
items.order_mods: Request grilled chicken only via customization. Top protein choice at Taco Bell.

items.name: Chicken Power Menu Bowl (modified)
items.order_mods: Request no rice, no beans (reduce carbs significantly). Extra chicken + lettuce + guacamole + pico only. No sour cream, no cheese. Fresco style recommended.

items.name: Chicken Cantina Bowl (modified)
items.order_mods: No rice, no beans. Grilled chicken + avocado + pico + lettuce only. No sour cream.

items.name: Crunchy Taco with Grilled Chicken (no cheese, no sour cream)
items.order_mods: Corn shell — gluten-free. Grilled chicken, lettuce, pico only. No cheese, no sour cream. Chew shell very thoroughly or discard shell and eat filling only.

items.name: Black Bean Burrito (filling only)
items.order_mods: Remove tortilla. Eat black bean filling only. High carb — limit quantity. Good protein/fiber in pureed phase if beans only.

items.name: Refried Beans (side)
items.order_mods: Excellent pureed-phase food. No tortilla. Small portions. Fresco style = less dairy.

items.name: Pico de Gallo (topping)
items.order_mods: Fresh tomatoes, onions, cilantro. Zero allergens. Good flavor addition.

items.name: Guacamole (side/topping)
items.order_mods: Made from real Hass avocados. Healthy fat. Good for all post-pureed phases.

items.name: Chicken Quesadilla (filling only)
items.order_mods: Eat chicken + cheese filling only. Discard tortilla. High fat — portion carefully.

items.name: 3-Cheese Chicken Flatbread Melt
items.order_mods: Eat filling only, discard flatbread. Good protein-to-calorie ratio for regular phase.

chains.name: Subway
chains.general_notes: No peanuts in any Subway ingredients (verified in official October 2025 allergen PDF). No shellfish in any Subway ingredients. All proteins and fresh vegetables can be ordered as a protein bowl (no bread) — ideal for bariatric patients. Tuna Salad contains fish — avoid or flag for fish allergy. Breads all contain gluten. Flatbread and wraps contain egg. Rotisserie chicken and roast beef are cleanest protein choices.

items.name: Rotisserie-Style Chicken (protein bowl)
items.allergen_note: Contains highly refined soy oil (marked * in allergen chart) — FDA-exempt refined oil
items.order_mods: Order as protein bowl. No bread. Add spinach, cucumbers, tomatoes, olives. No mayo, no cheese if watching fat. Plain or with yellow mustard.

items.name: Grilled Chicken (protein bowl)
items.order_mods: Order as protein bowl. No bread. Excellent lean protein. Top bariatric choice at Subway.

items.name: Roast Beef (protein bowl)
items.order_mods: Order as protein bowl. No bread. Zero major allergens in roast beef alone. Good lean protein.

items.name: Turkey Breast (protein bowl)
items.allergen_note: Contains highly refined soy (marked * — FDA-exempt refined oil)
items.order_mods: Order as protein bowl. Lowest calorie protein option at Subway. Add provolone for more protein.

items.name: Ham (Black Forest, protein bowl)
items.order_mods: Order as protein bowl. Very lean. Pair with eggs or cheese for more protein.

items.name: Egg Omelet Patty (protein bowl)
items.order_mods: Order as breakfast bowl. Soft egg texture appropriate for pureed/soft phase. No bread.

items.name: Provolone Cheese (add-on)
items.order_mods: Zero major allergens. Soft cheese — appropriate from pureed phase. Add to any protein bowl.

items.name: Chicken Noodle Soup (bowl, strained)
items.order_mods: For full-liquids: strain out noodles and eat broth + chicken only. For pureed: blend. Good early-phase warm comfort food.

items.name: Steak (protein bowl)
items.order_mods: Shaved steak — tender, no major allergens. Order as protein bowl. Chew well.

items.name: Tuna Salad (protein bowl)
items.fish_warning: Contains fish — note if fish allergy is also present. No shellfish.
items.order_mods: No bread. Contains fish (tuna) — acceptable if fish allergy not present. Confirm no shellfish cross-contact.

chains.name: Sprouts Farmers Market
chains.general_notes: Sprouts is a grocery store — items are SKUs, not menu items. Focus on deli/prepared foods, butcher counter, and bariatric-staple packaged goods. Staff can provide allergen info on prepared foods from ingredient labels. Peanut products are sold in store but separate sections. Cross-contact risk lower than fast food. Their butcher counter carries organic/USDA choice meats, poultry, and sustainably sourced seafood. Look for items marked peanut-free on labels. Carne Asada from Butcher Shop: 23g protein/100g serving.

items.name: Sprouts Organic Boneless Skinless Chicken Breast (butcher/packaged)
items.order_mods: Grill, bake, or steam at home. Best when slow-cooked for softer texture. Ideal bariatric protein.

items.name: Sprouts Butcher Shop Carne Asada
items.order_mods: Lean beef, no carbs. Ask staff about marinade ingredients. Chop finely or slice thin.

items.name: Sprouts Plain Greek Yogurt (store brand, non-fat)
items.order_mods: Plain, non-fat, no added sugar. Excellent from full-liquids onward. Top protein/calorie density in liquids phase.

items.name: Good Culture Cottage Cheese (4% milkfat, plain)
items.order_mods: Plain cottage cheese — soft, creamy, high protein. Ideal pureed phase food. Many Sprouts carry Good Culture or similar brands.

items.name: Fairlife Protein Shake (11.5 oz, chocolate or vanilla)
items.order_mods: Ultra-filtered milk protein, lactose-free. 30g protein, only 2g sugar. Top bariatric protein drink.

items.name: Premier Protein Shake (11.5 oz)
items.order_mods: Verify current formula — avoid peanut butter flavor (contains peanuts). Chocolate, vanilla, caramel are safe.

items.name: Koia Plant-Based Protein Drink (vanilla bean or cacao bean)
items.tree_nut_note: Made with coconut and brown rice protein — coconut is technically a tree nut per FDA
items.order_mods: Dairy-free option. Plant-based protein. Verify coconut tolerance with allergist (technically tree nut).

items.name: Sprouts Vegan Protein Powder (soy-free, pea protein)
items.order_mods: Pea protein, dairy-free, soy-free. Mix with water or unsweetened almond milk. Check label for current formulation.

items.name: Hard Boiled Eggs (deli section, plain)
items.order_mods: Mash with small amount of water or broth for pureed phase. Good travel protein snack.

items.name: String Cheese (mozzarella, individual sticks)
items.order_mods: Soft cheese, portable, no peanut/shellfish. Good snack from pureed phase.

items.name: Sprouts Rotisserie Chicken (whole or half, no skin)
items.order_mods: Remove skin. Breast meat is leanest. Shred for pureed phase. Ask staff for ingredient list on seasoning — plain/lemon herb typically allergen-free.

items.name: Good & Gather Turkey Slices (Target reference SKU carried by Sprouts equivalents)
items.order_mods: Low-sodium turkey breast. Roll/eat plain. Soft enough for soft-solids phase.

chains.name: Target (Good & Gather)
chains.general_notes: Good & Gather is Target's private label brand. Not a restaurant — focus on packaged staples appropriate for bariatric post-op diet. AVOID: Peanut Butter Protein Granola (contains peanut). Protein Bars with tree nuts (almonds/cashews). Focus on plain protein sources, plain dairy, jerky (no added allergens). All products have allergen labels on package — always verify before purchase.

items.name: Good & Gather Original Beef Jerky (2.65 oz)
items.order_mods: Chew extremely thoroughly. High sodium. Avoid in early phases (too tough). Regular phase only — small bites.

items.name: Good & Gather Low-Fat Greek Yogurt Plain (5.3 oz)
items.order_mods: Plain, low-sugar. One of best affordable bariatric food staples. Mix with protein powder in full-liquids phase.

items.name: Good & Gather 2% Milkfat Cottage Cheese (24 oz)
items.order_mods: Plain cottage cheese. Soft, creamy, high protein. Can blend for pureed phase.

items.name: Good & Gather Large Eggs (12-ct)
items.order_mods: Scrambled, soft-boiled, poached. Versatile bariatric staple. Scrambled eggs acceptable from pureed phase.

items.name: Good & Gather Chicken Breast (boneless, skinless, 3 lb bag)
items.order_mods: Bake, grill, or slow-cook. No allergens in raw chicken. Season with herbs, not peanut-containing sauces.

items.name: Good & Gather 93/7 Lean Ground Turkey
items.order_mods: Cook fully. Ground texture is soft — good for soft-solids phase. Make ground turkey scramble with eggs.

items.name: Good & Gather Mozzarella String Cheese
items.order_mods: Pull apart into thin strips for soft-solids phase. Portable protein snack.

items.name: Good & Gather Uncured Turkey Deli Slices
items.order_mods: Plain turkey slices. Roll up and eat plain or with cottage cheese. Very lean, very soft.

items.name: Good & Gather Non-Fat Plain Greek Yogurt (32 oz)
items.order_mods: Best value plain Greek yogurt. Thin with milk or protein shake for full-liquids. Mix with sugar-free gelatin for flavor.

cuisines.name: Mexican
cuisines.description: Traditional Mexican cuisine has excellent bariatric-safe options when ordered correctly. Key: avoid rice and tortillas in regular bariatric phase, avoid shellfish-based dishes entirely (mariscos), and verify mole sauce does NOT contain peanuts.

safe_items.name: Carne Asada (grilled beef, plain)
safe_items.order_mods: Order plain, no marinade with peanut-based sauces. Slice thin or chop. Ask for protein only — no tortillas, no rice.
safe_items.notes: Lean, flavorful beef. Ask restaurant if marinade contains any peanut ingredients. Most traditional marinades: lime, garlic, cumin — all safe.

safe_items.name: Pollo Asado (grilled chicken, plain)
safe_items.order_mods: Grilled, not fried. No marinade with peanut sauce. No tortillas. Ask for protein bowl style.
safe_items.notes: Excellent bariatric protein. Traditional marinades are safe. Ask specifically if any nut-based sauces used.

safe_items.name: Al Pastor (marinated pork, no tortilla)
safe_items.order_mods: No tortilla, no pineapple (sugar). Eat meat only. Thinly sliced from spit — tender texture. Ask about marinade ingredients.
safe_items.notes: Traditional al pastor: dried chiles, pineapple, achiote, cumin — no peanuts or shellfish.

safe_items.name: Carnitas (braised pork, plain)
safe_items.order_mods: Tender braised pork. No tortilla, no rice. Add salsa verde or pico. High fat — portion carefully.
safe_items.notes: Slow-braised, very tender. Excellent soft-solids texture.

safe_items.name: Refried Beans (frijoles refritos)
safe_items.order_mods: No lard (ask for vegetable oil or specify). Smooth consistency ideal for pureed phase. Small portions — carb-heavy.
safe_items.notes: One of the best pureed-phase foods. Rich in plant protein and fiber.

safe_items.name: Guacamole (fresh)
safe_items.order_mods: No chips. Use as condiment/topping. Healthy fat.
safe_items.notes: Pure avocado, lime, onion, cilantro. No allergens. Great healthy fat source.

safe_items.name: Pico de Gallo (fresh salsa)
safe_items.order_mods: Fresh tomato, onion, cilantro, lime. No allergens. Excellent condiment.
safe_items.notes: Calorie-free flavor. Ask for mild spice in early bariatric phases to avoid irritation.

safe_items.name: Caldo de Pollo (chicken soup/broth)
safe_items.order_mods: Strain for clear liquids phase. Drink broth only. Keep chicken pieces small for soft-solids.
safe_items.notes: Perfect clear/full liquid phase food. Hydrating, comforting, protein-containing.

watch_for: MOLE SAUCE: Traditional mole can contain peanuts or mixed nuts. ALWAYS ask 'Does your mole contain peanuts or nuts?' before ordering.
MARISCOS: Any seafood restaurant section (mariscos = shellfish/seafood) — AVOID entirely. Includes: camarones (shrimp), ostiones (oysters), almejas (clams), langosta (lobster), jaiba (crab).
PIPIÁN SAUCE: Green or red pipián is traditionally made with pepitas (pumpkin seeds) — usually safe, but some versions contain peanuts. Verify.
ENCHILADAS MOLERAS: Mole-based enchiladas may contain peanuts.
TORTILLAS: Flour tortillas contain gluten/wheat — skip in regular bariatric phase. Corn tortillas are gluten-free but still carb-heavy.
RICE: Mexican rice is carb-heavy — skip or eat 2-3 bites maximum in regular phase.
FRIED ITEMS: Chimichangas, flautas, chalupas — all fried. Avoid post-sleeve (too high fat, too dense).
SALSAS WITH PEANUTS: Some regional Mexican salsas (salsa macha, adobo) may contain peanuts. Ask staff.

cuisines.name: Italian
cuisines.description: Traditional Italian cuisine offers excellent lean protein options. Key: avoid pasta, bread, and heavy cream sauces. Grilled chicken (pollo alla griglia), fish, and lean meats with vegetable sides are ideal. Italian restaurants often have better allergen awareness than fast food.

safe_items.name: Grilled Chicken Breast (pollo alla griglia)
safe_items.order_mods: Plain grilled, no breading. With lemon and herbs. No pasta side — ask for steamed vegetables instead.
safe_items.notes: Most Italian restaurants offer plain grilled chicken. Excellent bariatric protein.

safe_items.name: Chicken Piccata (no pasta)
safe_items.order_mods: No pasta. Substitute steamed vegetables. Light lemon-caper sauce is fine. Skip heavy breading — ask for lightly dusted or unbreaded.
safe_items.notes: Thin-pounded chicken — tender, easy to chew. Lemon-butter-caper sauce has minimal carbs.

safe_items.name: Chicken Marsala (no pasta, moderate sauce)
safe_items.order_mods: No pasta. Substitute steamed broccoli or zucchini. Request light sauce — mushroom marsala can be heavy. No bread.
safe_items.notes: Mushroom + wine sauce is flavorful. Avoid if you have difficulty with mushroom texture early post-op.

safe_items.name: Italian Wedding Soup
safe_items.order_mods: Remove pasta in early phases. Eat broth + meatballs + spinach. Excellent texture-appropriate soup.
safe_items.notes: Small soft meatballs ideal for soft-solids. Rich broth is good for full-liquids if strained.

safe_items.name: Minestrone Soup (strained)
safe_items.order_mods: Strain or blend for full-liquids and pureed phases. Low protein — add protein powder or pair with chicken.
safe_items.notes: Vegetable broth-based. Blend for pureed phase. Rich in micronutrients.

safe_items.name: Carpaccio (beef or chicken, plain)
safe_items.order_mods: Thin-sliced, no crostini. Lemon, capers, arugula fine. No parmesan if dairy is being limited. Chew well.
safe_items.notes: Very thin protein — no shellfish, no peanuts in traditional preparation.

safe_items.name: Steamed Broccoli or Zucchini (side)
safe_items.order_mods: Steamed, no butter or oil initially. Soft-cooked. Chew well. Pair with grilled chicken.
safe_items.notes: Non-starchy vegetables are ideal bariatric sides.

watch_for: PASTA: Avoid entirely post-sleeve — high carb, poor protein, can expand in pouch. Never order pasta as primary dish.
BREAD/FOCACCIA: Do not eat before or during meal — fills pouch with no nutrition.
CREAM SAUCES (Alfredo, carbonara): Very high fat — can cause dumping syndrome. Avoid in first 6 months.
RISOTTO: Extremely high carb, can swell in stomach. Avoid.
CALAMARI: Squid = shellfish/mollusk. AVOID entirely due to severe shellfish allergy.
FRUTTI DI MARE: Seafood pasta = multiple shellfish types. AVOID.
PESTO: Some versions contain pine nuts (tree nut). Verify pine nut allergy status separately.
TIRAMISU / CANNOLI / DESSERTS: All high sugar — risk of dumping syndrome. Avoid entirely in first year.
